sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(116) — Redwood Creek and tributaries (Alameda Co.)
sources.quotedText: (116) Redwood Creek and tributaries (Alameda Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 231419, "Redwood Creek", Stream, Alameda/Contra Costa Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":231419,"gaz_name":"Redwood Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Alameda"}; geometry is an esriGeometryMultipoint with two points — mouth point (Web Mercator -13595539.7434, 4549988.3187) converts to lon -122.13081, lat 37.79132, on Redwood Road in Alameda County near the mouth of Redwood Creek; the second point (-13601202.3892, 4555478.1248 → lon -122.18168, lat 37.83028) is the creek's upper reach within Redwood Regional Park toward the Contra Costa County line. Corrects the file's prior coordinate (-122.1636, 37.8141), which was ~3.8km from the GNIS mouth point and did not match either GNIS endpoint — likely a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull.

sources.title: Dr. Aurelia Reinhardt Redwood Regional Park | East Bay Regional Park District
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Redwood Creek and all of its tributaries in Alameda County are closed to all fishing year-round. Redwood Creek runs through Redwood Regional Park in the Oakland hills and supports a relict, non-hybridized native population of coastal rainbow trout isolated from the ocean by Chabot Dam since 1875.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Redwood Creek and tributaries (Alameda Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This water is closed to all fishing all year, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
